name: Bickslow
description:
__Occupation:__ Mage
__Affiliation:__ Fairy Tail
__Team:__ Thunder Legion
__Magic:__ Seith Magic, Figure Eyes

Bickslow, also spelled Bixlow, is a mage who belongs to the guild Fairy Tail. He, along with Freed Justine and Evergreen, make up the Thunder Legion. Like the other members of the Thunder Legion, he has great respect for Laxus Dreyar and has been shown to go against Fairy Tail on Laxus' command. Bickslow has a lighthearted personality and has the tendency to laugh out loud and stick out his tongue. The magic he uses allows him to control and see souls; he refers to the dolls that he controls as his "babies." His dolls tend to repeat the last word they spoke when they complete their sentences.
